description: Official FIFA World Cup 26 best-third assignment lookup. Each case maps one qualifying-group combination to explicit round-of-32 fixture positions: assignment keys are real match_id values from data/external/fixture_2026.csv (side: away), and values are the third-placed team's group letter.

provenance.annex: Annexe C: Combinations for eight best third-placed teams (physical pages 80-98, options 1-495)
provenance.extracted_by: Claude (GSD executor, plan 03-01), reviewed against rendered page images of the official PDF
provenance.review: Structural verification at extraction time: 495 contiguous options; 8 distinct groups per option; qualifying sets equal the complete C(12,8) enumeration; every assignment allowed by the real fixture slot token; 14 option rows cross-checked character-by-character against independently rendered page images with zero mismatches. Selector positions taken from the frozen fixture_2026.csv rows, not inferred from token matching.
